title: TruthTrap: A Bilingual Benchmark for Evaluating Factually Correct Yet Misleading Information in Question Answering
desc: Introduces a bilingual benchmark to detect answers that are factually supported yet misleading in QA.

title: Beyond Hate Speech: NLP's Challenges and Opportunities in Uncovering Dehumanizing Language
desc: Systematic LLM comparison on dehumanization detection; group-level disparities and derogation vs. dehumanization.

title: Global PIQA: Evaluating Physical Commonsense Reasoning Across 100+ Languages and Cultures
desc: Participatory commonsense benchmark in 100+ language varieties, co-created by 335 researchers; culturally grounded and cross-lingual physical reasoning.

title: LingAlign: A Multilingual, Multidimensional Benchmark for Evaluating LLM Alignment Variability
desc: Multilingual, multidimensional benchmark for how LLM alignment varies across languages and dimensions.

title: More or Less Wrong: A Benchmark for Directional Bias in LLM Comparative Reasoning
desc: Evaluates whether models exhibit systematic skew when comparing two sides of an issue.

title: Measuring Gender Bias in Language Models in Farsi
desc: Empirical study of gender bias in Farsi LLMs and corpora across several tasks.

title: MultiHoax: A Dataset of Multi-hop False-premise questions
desc: Multihop QA under explicitly false premises to test reasoning and entailed inconsistency across regions and knowledge types.

title: Can I Introduce My Boyfriend to My Grandmother? Evaluating Large Language Models' Capabilities on Iranian Social Norm Classification
desc: Social-norm understanding for Iranian context with culturally grounded scenarios.

title: Not All Jokes Land: Evaluating Large Language Models' Understanding of Workplace Humor
desc: Benchmark for recognizing workplace humor and its absence.
